contexts.context: …closure is to use a relation R and the <mark>exponation</mark> operator. R¹ means R. R² means R twice…
…function. Then R+ means the union of the <mark>exponents</mark> 1 to unbounded and R* means the union from…
…to unbounded. The min/max are the <mark>exponents</mark> in the union. This does seem like a…
…make better sense if there’s some discussion of the <mark>exponent</mark> notation?
